title: Spider Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials that adds a Spider Swarm Moon
body:
![Spider Moon headers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43fe6f656b5d33e0062760db03da255c75a4806d.png)
During the rare Spider Moon event, the weight of spider spawns will be greatly increased, and during a Super Spider Moon, all mob spawns will increase by a large amount as well, leading to a world overrun by creepy crawlies.

For added creepy-crawliness, try it with [Nyf's Spiders](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders)

 All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco

 Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
